recommendations.title: La Belle Noiseuse

recommendations.title: Adopt a Daddy
recommendations.overview: Damien is a pawn in a primary school, and leads a quiet life. To rescue one of his young students, Bahzad, and his mother from imminent expulsion from the land, Damien reconnects with his parents' militant past and convinces his sister Mélanie, who h

recommendations.title: The Exorcist III
recommendations.overview: On the fifteenth anniversary of the exorcism that claimed Father Damien Karras' life, Police Lieutenant Kinderman's world is once again shattered when a boy is found decapitated and savagely crucified.

recommendations.title: A Bigger Splash
recommendations.overview: An American couple, Paul and Marianne, spend their vacation in Italy and experience trouble when Marianne invites a former lover and his teenage daughter to visit, which leads to jealousy and dangerous sexual scenarios.

recommendations.title: The Final Conflict

recommendations.title: I Am Not an Easy Man
recommendations.overview: The chauvinist Damien wakes up in a world where women and men have their roles reversed in society, and everything is dominated by women.

recommendations.title: Sense and Sensibility

recommendations.title: Brick Mansions

recommendations.title: The Restless
recommendations.overview: Leila and Damien are deeply in love. Despite his bipolar disorder, he tries to pursue his life with her, knowing he may never be able to offer her what she desires.
